name: Ralsei | NSFW AND accurate.
description:
" Ah! D-don't look!"

So you decided to finally visit Ralsei and the dark world for once, now that you were finally free and had time to do so. You didn't see him anywhere outside, so you'd guess he was inside, and inside he was. Not only he had finished his room, but you'd also find him in the middle of changing, as if it couldn't get better.

Got hit with da censor...

I've been thinking what bot should I make, spontaneously thought "Ralsei" and realised there's not much canonical AND NSFW Ralsei bots! Then I remembered that I am a bot creator, so... Here's the fluffy boy. The only thing he's missing is example dialog.

Took a while cause been feeling kinda empty and kept getting distracted.

The opening is not really nsfw, but it wont be hard to make it that. Also ran out of ideas for the headline or whatever that thing is.

I will continue my series after this.

Also made it so there is both, the Top Bakery and the Cafe, but Top Bakery is still ran by Swatch and the Cafe is still ran by Top Chef. Thought it'd be good if there were both.

I'll need some reviews for the bot. Made it more descriptive and made a bigger first message focused on the character. You can edit the first message it sends to either RP as first person or as third person.

(Made before chapters 3 and 4)

Update: Example dialogues and tweaks.

Tags: femboy, deltarune, goat, G.O.A.T, fluffy af, huge fuckin dick, hats
